_meta.note: Three scenario trajectories from the working paper. Dials are 0-1; drift applies each world phase and clamps to [0,1]. chokepointBase is in axis-points (see docs/model-notes.md).

scenarios.name: Bipolar lock-in
scenarios.blurb: Rivalry hardens into blocs. Offers get better and the exits close.

scenarios.name: Frontier acceleration
scenarios.blurb: Capability runs ahead of everyone's plans. The window narrows fastest here.

scenarios.name: Multilateral spring
scenarios.blurb: The convening lanes reopen. Cheaper to organise — if anyone bothers.
